tools.name: files_read_file
tools.description: Read the contents of a file.

path.description: File path relative to the sandbox root (use ./ prefix)

tools.name: files_read_lines
tools.description: Read a range of lines from a file with line numbers. Returns lines in the format {line_number}|{content}. Use this instead of files_read_file when you only need a specific portion of a file to reduce context usage.

path.description: File path relative to the sandbox root (use ./ prefix)

start_line.description: Line number to start reading at (1-indexed, inclusive)

end_line.description: Line number to end reading at (1-indexed, inclusive). Defaults to start_line (single line read) if omitted.

tools.name: files_list_dir
tools.description: List files and directories at a given path. When an AGENTS.md file exists in the listed directory, its contents are automatically appended to the listing as a context section — this is not part of the ls output but an automatic context-loading feature.

path.description: Directory path relative to the sandbox root (use ./ prefix)

long.description: Show detailed format with permissions, size, and dates

tools.name: files_search_content
tools.description: Search file contents for a pattern using grep. Returns matching lines with context.

path.description: File or directory path relative to the sandbox root (use ./ prefix)

recursive.description: Search directories recursively. Defaults to true when the path is a directory — set to false only to restrict the search to the top-level directory.

files_only.description: Show only file names that contain matches, not the matching lines

tools.name: files_write_file
tools.description: Write content to a file. Creates the file if it does not exist, overwrites if it does. Parent directories are created automatically if they do not exist.

path.description: File path relative to the sandbox root (use ./ prefix)

content.description: Content to write to the file

tools.name: files_write_lines
tools.description: Replace a range of lines in a file without rewriting the entire file. Lines outside the range are preserved unchanged. Use this instead of files_write_file for targeted edits to large files.

path.description: File path relative to the sandbox root (use ./ prefix)

start_line.description: Line number to start replacing at (1-indexed, inclusive)

end_line.description: Line number to end replacing at (1-indexed, inclusive). Defaults to start_line (single line replacement) if omitted.

content.description: Replacement content for the specified line range

tools.name: files_append
tools.description: Append content to a file. Creates the file if it does not exist. Parent directories are created automatically if they do not exist.

path.description: File path relative to the sandbox root (use ./ prefix)

content.description: Content to append to the file

tools.name: files_delete_file
tools.description: Delete a file. Refuses to delete directories.

path.description: File path relative to the sandbox root (use ./ prefix)

tools.name: files_delete_dir
tools.description: Delete an empty directory. Refuses to delete non-empty directories or files.

path.description: Directory path relative to the sandbox root (use ./ prefix)
